description_long: This is a tall, ornate street lamp with a golden metallic finish and a robust, decorative base. The lamp features a central vertical pole topped with a rectangular housing, from which two horizontal arms extend, each supporting a cubic white lamp cover. The top of the pole is capped with a small, hexagonal finial, adding a touch of classical elegance. The base is wide and tiered, suggesting stability and a design meant to withstand outdoor conditions. The lamp covers are likely made of frosted or translucent material to diffuse light evenly. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional urban street lighting found in parks or along boulevards.
description: A tall, gold-colored ornate street lamp with two cubic white lamp covers and a decorative base, designed for outdoor urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both cubic lamp covers and the full decorative base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lamp covers and the rectangular housing.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both lamp covers and the ornate base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the lamp covers' depth and the rectangular housing.
